bird.name: 黑头白鹮
bird.summary: 黑頭白䴉（學名：Threskiornis melanocephalus）為䴉科白䴉屬的鳥類，主要分布於北緯30度以南的南亞、東南亞靠近沿海地區，從印度西部向東延伸到日本。以及中國東北的鶴崗、佳木斯一帶。這個物種的頭部沒有羽毛而露出黑色的皮膚，其他部分以白色羽毛為主；這是其範圍內…

locations.name: 约翰·莱瑟姆 (鸟类学家)

locations.name: 东南亚

locations.name: 中华人民共和国
locations.summary: 中华人民共和国是位於东亚的社会主义国家，也是現今世界少數由共产党建立並持續單獨執政的國家。国土面积约960万平方千米，位居世界各國第三位，其以漢族傳統領域為核心，涵蓋鄰太平洋的亞洲大陸東側大部區域，並與14個國家以陸地邊界接壤。全国行政区…

locations.name: 马来西亚

relations.subject: 黑头白鹮
relations.evidence: The black-headed ibis (Threskiornis melanocephalus), also known as the Oriental white ibis, Indian white ibis, and black-necked ibis, is a species of wading bird of the ibis family Threskiornithidae which breeds in the South and Southeast Asia from India to the west and as far east as Japan. It is the only native ibis species in its range that has an overall white plumage with a black neck and head

relations.subject: 黑头白鹮
relations.evidence: Though often referred to as a wetland species, the black-headed ibis forages in a range of natural and man-made habitats. This species of ibis nests only during the rainy season
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 黑头白鹮
relations.evidence: In summer, they largely use and prefer natural marshes and fallow fields, but in the monsoon, spread out more evenly to also use a variety of agricultural fields. In landscapes that have more forests and rocky hills as in southern Rajasthan, wetlands are the preferred habitats year-round and there is little difference in habitats used in different seasons. In more urban landscapes, black-headed ibis abundance was positively associated with crop fields, wetlands and open areas.{{Cite journal |last1=Barik |first1=Souvik |last2=Saha |first2=Goutam Kumar |last3=Mazumdar |first3=Subhendu |date=2022 |title=How the Habitat Features Influence Black-Headed Ibis (Threskiornis melanocephalus) in a Suburban Area?
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 黑头白鹮
relations.evidence: In summer, they largely use and prefer natural marshes and fallow fields, but in the monsoon, spread out more evenly to also use a variety of agricultural fields. In landscapes that have more forests and rocky hills as in southern Rajasthan, wetlands are the preferred habitats year-round and there is little difference in habitats used in different seasons. In more urban landscapes, black-headed ibis abundance was positively associated with crop fields, wetlands and open areas.{{Cite journal |last1=Barik |first1=Souvik |last2=Saha |first2=Goutam Kumar |last3=Mazumdar |first3=Subhendu |date=2022 |title=How the Habitat Features Influence Black-Headed Ibis (Threskiornis melanocephalus) in a Suburban Area?
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
